heading: Definitions
label: 15801 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Energy Policy Act of 2005, which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and repealed numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 109–58119 Stat. 594Aug. 8, 2005

children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Energy.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in .section 1001(a) of title 20

children.label: i
children.text: is organized, and at all times thereafter operated, exclusively for the benefit of, to perform the functions of, or to carry out the functions of one or more organizations referred to in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: is operated, supervised, or controlled by or in connection with one or more of those organizations.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.

children.heading: Small business concern
children.label: 5 Small business concern
children.text: The term “small business concern” has the meaning given the term in .section 632 of title 15
